violations.text: The breakfast 1 door reach-in was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cut watermelon, milk, and yogurt was observed held between 46-47 DF. Watermelon, milk, and yogurt were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Per PIC, bags of mixed cut melons were delivered today and observed between 43-44 DF. Bags of mixed melons were moved to a working refrigeration unit. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in the breakfast 1 door reach-in until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2024
